news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on May 8, 2025, Athabasca Oil Corporation (TSX: ATH) disclosed that all proposals put forth at the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on the same date have been completely authorized and ratified. The main agenda items encompassed setting the number of directors to be elected at eight, selecting all eight director nominees as proposed, and confirming the appointment of Ernst & Young LLP as the company's auditors.
news.headline: Athabasca Oil Corp's 2025 AGM approves 8 directors, Ernst & Young LLP as auditors. All presented matters authorized.

news.summary: A significant increase in backlog totaling $13.7 billion was reported, along with positive developments in Revenue, Adjusted EBITDA, and ROIC. Additionally, the company has affirmed its 2025 Guidance.
news.headline: NFI reports record backlog of $13.7 billion and improvements in Revenue, EBITDA, ROIC; reaffirms 2025 Guidance.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, WSP Global Inc. (TSX: WSP), a prominent professional services firm, conducted its annual shareholder meeting. The Meeting, held in a hybrid format, saw a significant turnout with 109,034,984 common shares represented, amounting to about 83% of all outstanding shares. Shareholders showed overwhelming support by voting in favor of all proposed agenda items. Detailed voting results for each item discussed at the Meeting are provided below.
news.headline: WSP shares annual meeting results: 109,034,984 shares represented (83%); all items of business approved.

news.summary: In Aurora, Ontario on May 08, 2025, Magna International Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its 2025 annual and special shareholder meeting. The meeting, attended by 221,621,186 Common Shares representing 78.66% of the total issued Common Shares, saw unanimous shareholder approval for all agenda items. The company's shares (TSX: MG; NYSE: MGA) were positively received, with resounding support across the board.
news.headline: Magna's 2025 shareholders meeting had 221,621,186 Common Shares or 78.66% represented, with all business items approved.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the economy grew by 4.5% last quarter, exceeding expectations. This growth was primarily driven by a surge in consumer spending, which increased by 6.2%. Additionally, exports rose by 3.8%, contributing to the overall expansion. However, business investment saw a slight decline of 1.1%. Unemployment also saw a decline, dropping to 3.8%, the lowest rate in the past five years. Inflation remained stable at 2.1%, staying within the target range set by the government. Overall, the economic indicators suggest a positive outlook for the country's financial health.
news.headline: FLINT reports strong Q1 2025 financial performance with revenue surpassing $100 million, marking a significant growth.
Battery metals company acquires Corvo Uranium Project & secures financing, expanding operations.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on May 08, 2025, Total Energy Services Inc. reported its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as TOT, released its consolidated financial figures for the three-month period ending March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Total Energy Services Inc. releases Q1 2025 results. Ended March 31, 2025, TSX: TOT.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that 4 out of every 10 adults in the country are not aware of the importance of vaccinating against the flu. This lack of awareness is concerning as the flu vaccine is crucial in preventing the spread of the virus and its potentially severe outcomes. Furthermore, it was found that only 6 out of 10 adults receive the flu vaccine each year. This low vaccination rate highlights the need for increased education and promotion of flu vaccination to protect public health. Efforts to improve awareness and access to the flu vaccine are essential in reducing the impact of the flu on the population.
news.headline: Northview Residential REIT sees 28% FFO growth in Q1 2025 financial results.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 8, 2025, Glacier Media Inc. (TSX: GVC) released its financial results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The Company disclosed its revenue and earnings data for the specified period.
news.headline: Glacier Media Inc. (TSX: GVC) reports Q1 2025 results showing revenue and earnings for the period ended March 31.

news.summary: Tarsus Pharmaceuticals, Inc., based in Irvine, California, made public on May 8, 2025, that they will be taking part in various investor conferences soon. The company, listed as TARS on NASDAQ, aims to engage with investors at these events.
news.headline: Tarsus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. to participate in investor conferences on May 08, 2025.

news.summary: Sugar Land, TX - On May 8, 2025, Team, Inc. (NYSE: TISI), a prominent provider of specialty industrial services globally, declared that it is set to reveal its first quarter 2025 earnings on May 12, 2025, post the New York Stock Exchange's closing. The company offers a range of mechanical, heat-treating, and inspection services to its customers. A conference call is scheduled for May 13, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. CT (11:00 a.m. ET) to discuss the financial and operational outcomes.
news.headline: Team, Inc. (NYSE: TISI) will release Q1 2025 earnings on May 12, 2025, followed by a conference call on May 13, 2025.

news.summary: Camping World Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWH), based in Lincolnshire, Illinois, announced its achievement in the RV industry. The company, recognized as the World’s Largest Recreational Vehicle Dealer, reported reaching a historic level of new and used unit market share in March 2025 as per data from Statistical Surveys, Inc. Additionally, Camping World's Coleman brand of travel trailers maintained its position as the top-selling travel trailer in the U.S. by unit volume for the year so far through March 2025.
news.headline: Camping World achieves record market share in March, Coleman travel trailers #1 in US year-to-date through March 2025.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, WM Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: MAPS), a prominent cannabis industry marketplace and technology solutions provider, released its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The CEO, Doug Francis, expressed satisfaction with the company's performance despite the challenging cannabis landscape. The first quarter saw solid execution amidst industry challenges. The CEO mentioned the ongoing discussion on rescheduling in the cannabis sector, reflecting a renewed interest.
news.headline: WM Technology, Inc. reports Q1 2025 financial results; CEO Doug Francis cites challenging cannabis industry environment.

news.summary: Alaska Communications has partnered with Slalom to offer advanced cloud solutions for businesses and government agencies in Alaska. This collaboration aims to enhance efficiency and sustainability in the oil and gas sector, as well as improve real-time collaboration and learning opportunities in public education. By leveraging managed cloud services, this partnership will drive innovation across various industries in Alaska.
news.headline: Alaska Communications & Slalom partner to provide managed cloud solutions for Alaska enterprises & govt organizations. #innovation #collaboration

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global carbon dioxide emissions reached a record high of 36.8 billion metric tons in 2019, representing a 0.6% increase from the previous year. The main contributors to this increase were China with 28% of the global total emissions, the United States with 15%, and the European Union with 9%. On the other hand, India's emissions increased by 1.6%, making it the third-largest emitter globally. These findings highlight the urgent need for more significant efforts and global cooperation to address and mitigate the impacts of climate change.
news.headline: Portman Ridge Finance Corp reveals Q1 2025 financial results.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in New York, BUILD, a nationwide nonprofit organization, is highlighting up-and-coming entrepreneurial innovators and influencers through its BUILDFest Youth Pitch Competitions happening in May and June in Washington, D.C., Pittsburgh, Boston, Los Angeles, and other locations. The event aims to promote the skills and ideas of young leaders.
news.headline: BUILDFest 2025 highlights young entrepreneurs across the US in Youth Pitch Competitions. Events held in 5 cities.

news.summary: Ride-hailing company LYFT, Inc. (NASDAQ: LYFT) announced its Q1 results post-market close on Thursday. LYFT posted earnings of $0.01 per share, surpassing the anticipated loss of $0.01 per share. Quarterly revenue stood at $1.45 billion, slightly below the expected $1.47 billion. The board approved a boost in share repurchase program, now totaling $750 million, with plans to utilize $500 million in the near term. More information is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Lyft shares rise after Q1 report, earnings at one cent per share, revenue $1.45 billion. Stock buyback program raised to $750 million.

news.summary: Coinbase Global (NASDAQ: COIN) released its first-quarter financial report, revealing a total revenue of $2.03 billion. This figure fell short of the anticipated $2.12 billion, as per data from Benzinga Pro. The revenue showed an increase from $1.64 billion in the same quarter last year, but a 10% decrease from the fourth quarter's $2.27 billion. Transaction revenue for the quarter stood at $1.26 billion, up from $1.08 billion year-over-year but down 19% from the previous quarter. Subscription and services revenue reached $698.1 million, aligning with the projected range of $685 million to $765 million and marking a 9% increase from the previous quarter. Despite this, adjusted earnings per share fell short of expectations at $1.94, compared to the projected $2.11.
news.headline: Coinbase reports Q1 revenue of $2.03B, missing estimates; transaction revenue at $1.26B, up 19%; adjusted EPS at $1.94.

news.summary: Coinbase reported lower-than-expected Q1 results, following a notable $2.9 billion acquisition, amidst a surge in bitcoin pricing. The company's stock declined upon the earnings announcement, while bitcoin's value surpassed $100,000.
news.headline: Coinbase stock drops after missing Q1 estimates; Bitcoin surpasses $100,000 amidst $2.9 billion acquisition.

news.summary: Insulet's stock surged late on Thursday after the insulin pump manufacturer exceeded the anticipated earnings for the first quarter and elevated its projections. This bullish post-earnings move sparked optimism among investors, leading to a breakout. The company's positive performance indicates a strong market position, with a promising outlook for future growth.
news.headline: Insulet stock surged after beating Q1 forecast & raising outlook, signaling a bullish post-earnings move.

news.summary: Cloudflare's stock experienced a decline following the release of its Q1 earnings report. Although earnings were in line with expectations, the revenue exceeded estimates. The revenue guidance for the future also met projections. This led to an overall lukewarm response from investors. The company's performance demonstrated a strong revenue growth during the stated period, with earnings meeting market forecasts. Despite this, the revenue guidance for the future wasn't as impressive, resulting in a drop in Cloudflare's stock value.
news.headline: Cloudflare's Q1 earnings meet expectations, revenue beats, but guidance disappoints. Stock falls.

news.summary: An announcement from Expedia indicated that the company is experiencing lower than anticipated travel demand in the United States. Following a combination of positive and negative results in the first quarter, Expedia's stock saw a decline. The stock's decrease was influenced by the warning from the travel website regarding the weak U.S. travel demand.
news.headline: Expedia's stock drops after mixed Q1 as U.S. travel demand is lower than expected.

news.summary: SoundHound AI, a company specializing in conversational voice AI technology, experienced a challenging first quarter, with their stock taking a hit. The company's performance was described as mixed, leading to a decline in their stock value. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: SoundHound AI's first-quarter report was disappointing, causing a drop in stock value. Mixed results led to a negative impact.

news.summary: Coinbase's recent acquisition of the crypto derivatives platform Deribit for $2.9 billion showcases the growing significance of financial derivatives for cryptocurrency exchanges. This deal is the largest corporate acquisition in the crypto industry to date. It is part of the escalating competition between digital asset exchanges like Coinbase, Kraken, and Robinhood to dominate the expanding crypto derivatives market. The merger propels Coinbase to the top spot as the world's largest crypto derivatives platform by open interest, with the exchange reporting about $10 billion in trading volume on May 8. The acquisition enhances Coinbase's global footprint, especially in the derivatives market. Deribit, the largest crypto options exchange, with approximately $30 trillion in open interest, strengthens Coinbase's presence in the global market, primarily against Binance. Despite Deribit not catering to US-based traders, it remains a popular platform for global traders dealing in Bitcoin and Ethereum options. This strategic move not only broadens Coinbase's derivatives product offerings but also places it at the forefront of the crypto derivatives landscape.
news.headline: Coinbase buys Deribit for $2.9B, aiming to dominate the crypto derivatives market. Kraken bought NinjaTrader for $1.5B in March.

news.summary: Mount Pleasant, Michigan - On May 8, 2025, Isabella Bank Corporation (OTCQX: ISBA), the parent company of Isabella Bank, disclosed that its common stock will now be traded on The Nasdaq Capital Market using the same symbol, "ISBA."
news.headline: Isabella Bank Corp (ISBA) to be listed on Nasdaq as "ISBA" with OTCQX. Trading on The Nasdaq Capital Market.

news.summary: Yale, Stanford, and Kaiser Permanente are partnering with Clarium to develop robust healthcare supply chains in response to the current global supply chain unpredictability. Clarium, a pioneer in AI technology for supply chain resilience, is assisting in this initiative. This collaboration comes at a crucial time as organizations around the world are facing challenges in supply chain management. The effort aims to enhance the supply networks of these prestigious institutions, ensuring that they remain efficient and reliable in the face of disruptions. By leveraging Clarium's innovative solutions, Yale, Stanford, and Kaiser Permanente seek to strengthen their healthcare supply chains for the future.
news.headline: Clarium secures $27M Series A funding to expand AI supply chain tech in healthcare with Yale, Stanford, and Kaiser Permanente.

news.summary: Echo360 and GoReact are collaborating to provide AI-powered video assessment tools, benefiting millions of learners and educators globally. This initiative aims to enhance feedback, engagement, and learning outcomes. Recently announced in New York on May 8, 2025, Echo360, a renowned educational technology company, continues to lead in innovative learning solutions for both the business and education sectors.
news.headline: Echo360 acquires GoReact to enhance its learning platform with AI video assessment. New York, May 8, 2025.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Alliance Entertainment Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: AENT), a leading distributor of entertainment and pop culture collectibles, announced a conference call scheduled for May 15 at 4:30 p.m. EST to review its performance in the third quarter ending March 31, 2025. news.summary: In Bozeman, Montana, Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE: FICO) disclosed it has successfully priced $1.5 billion worth of 6.000% Senior Notes due 2033 in a private offering exempt from registration under the Securities Act of 1933. These Notes, sold to investors at 100% of their principal amount, represent senior unsecured obligations of FICO. The company plans to utilize the net proceeds generated from this Notes offering for undisclosed purposes.
news.headline: FICO priced $1.5 billion in 6.000% Senior Notes due 2033 in private offering to use the net proceeds for unspecified purposes.

news.summary: Permuto Capital LLC, a collaboration between 3V Capital Partners SE LLC and Chia Network Inc., revealed today that they have submitted revised registration statements for the MSFT Trust filed on Jan 15, 2025, and the AVGO and AAPL Trusts filed on Feb 28, 2025. The offering will be conducted through a prospectus. Preliminary prospectuses for these trusts are available.
news.headline: Permuto Capital files amended registration statements for MSFT Trust on Jan 15, AVGO & AAPL Trusts on Feb 28, 2025.

news.summary: NHC, the oldest publicly traded long-term health care company in the US, revealed it will distribute a 64-cent per common share dividend to shareholders on June 30, 2025, with payment on August 1, 2025. This figure marks a 4.9% boost from the previous quarterly dividend. The company stated this in a press release, emphasizing that any non-historic information mentioned in it should be viewed as forward-looking statements.
news.headline: NHC's common dividend to increase by 4.9% to 64 cents per share, payable on August 1, 2025.

news.summary: Rocket Lab USA Inc (NASDAQ: RKLB) released their first-quarter financial results post-market on Thursday. The space company reported Q1 revenue of $122.57 million, surpassing the anticipated $121.38 million. Their Q1 loss stood at 12 cents per share, better than the projected 13 cents per share loss. Rocket Lab observed a 32% increase in total revenue compared to the previous year, attributed to the successful launch of five Electron missions for three commercial satellite constellation operators in Q1. As of the quarter's end, the company held about $303.15 million in cash and equivalents, up from $271 million in 2024. Rocket Lab's strong performance in the quarter is detailed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Rocket Lab reported Q1 revenue of $122.57M, beating estimates. EPS beat at 12 cents loss vs 13 cents. Cash at $303.15M.Launching Neutron for US Air Force.

news.summary: Air Canada reported operating revenues of $5.196 billion for the first quarter of 2025, showing a 1% decrease year over year. The company had an operating loss of $108 million and an adjusted EBITDA of $387 million, with a 7.4% margin. Cash flow from operating activities was $1.526 billion, with free cash flow of $831 million, a year-over-year decrease of $66 million and $225 million respectively. The leverage ratio was 1.3 at the end of March 2025, down from 1.4 at the end of 2024. Air Canada purchased and cancelled over 15 million shares in the quarter and announced a substantial issuer bid to purchase and cancel up to $500 million of shares. The company plans to increase its ASM capacity by 2-2.5% in the second quarter of 2025 and updated its full year 2025 guidance, with adjusted EBITDA expected to be between $3.2 billion to $3.6 billion. The company also announced its long-term 2028 financial targets, including operating revenues of approximately $30 billion and an adjusted EBITDA margin greater than or equal to 17%. Air Canada intends to fund the substantial issuer bid with cash on hand and believes in creating value for shareholders in the long term.
news.headline: Air Canada reported Q1 2025 financial results: $5.196 billion operating revenues, $108 million operating loss, and $387 million adjusted EBITDA. Cash flow from operating activities was $1.526 billion, with free cash flow of $831 million. Leverage ratio decreased from 1.4 to 1.3 compared to end of 2024. Over 15 million shares were purchased and cancelled. A substantial issuer bid (SIB) up to $500 million of shares was announced. CEO highlighted revenue diversification strategy and customer satisfaction. Q2 2025 ASM capacity to increase by 2-2.5%. Updated 2025 guidance included adjusted EBITDA $3.2-$3.6 billion. A substantial issuer bid of up to $500 million worth of shares was authorized. Guidance for 2028 targets and 2030 aspirations also provided. Please see the full story for more details.

news.summary: Gateway Fiber has begun construction in Shoreview, Minnesota, to provide residents and businesses with 100% fiber-optic internet service. This will offer symmetrical multi-gig connectivity, enhancing the internet experience in the area. The company's initiative aims to improve internet connectivity in the Minneapolis metro region. The network's deployment marks a significant advancement for Shoreview, signaling a transformation in internet capabilities with faster and more reliable service.
news.headline: Gateway Fiber begins construction on new high-speed internet service in Shoreview, MN, with symmetrical multi-gig connectivity for residents and businesses. Expanding across the Minneapolis metro area.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Quartzsea Acquisition Corp (Nasdaq: QSEAU) made an announcement regarding the ability for holders of the 8,280,000 units from its initial public offering to opt for separate trading of ordinary shares and rights within the units starting from around May 12, 2025. If units are not separated, they will continue trading on the Nasdaq Global Market as "QSEAU," while the separated ordinary shares and rights are anticipated to trade as "QSEA" and "QSEAR," respectively. Holders of units must arrange for their brokers to contact Continental Stock Transfer & Trust Co., the Company’s transfer agent, for the process of separating the units into ordinary shares and rights.
news.headline: Quartzsea Acquisition Corp allows separate trading of its 8,280,000 units sold in the IPO starting May 12, 2025. Symbol changes expected on Nasdaq. Contact transfer agent for separation.
